name: Four Bridges Country Club
description: Four Bridges Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Middletown, OH. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Gilbert Farms Park
description: Come play pickleball at Gilbert Farms Park in Fairfield, OH! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hamilton Pickleball at Officer Bob Gentry Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hamilton Pickleball at Officer Bob Gentry Park in Hamilton, OH! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Harbin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Harbin Park in Fairfield, OH! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to water and restrooms.

name: Keehner Park Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Keehner Park Courts in United States, OH! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Lefferson Park
description: Lefferson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Middletown, OH. There are 27 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Open play seven days a week

name: Lockwood Park in Coventry
description: Come play pickleball at Lockwood Park in Coventry in United States, OH! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Pickle4Life
description: Pickle 4 Life is a community-driven indoor pickleball facility featuring six brand-new, premier courts designed for great play and a welcoming atmosphere. We offer open play for all skill levels, making it easy for beginners, intermediates, and competitive players to find the right games. Our facility also includes a bar and pro shop, so you can relax, grab a drink, and gear up before or after your matches. For players looking to improve, we provide lessons and adaptive training programs focused on helping everyone grow their game. Whether you’re brand new to pickleball or a seasoned player, Pickle 4 Life is built to bring people together around the sport and community we love.
fees: Members only — Paid memberships and Non-membership available.

name: PrimeTime Fieldhouse
description: Open pickleball play 2-3/week during the winter. $10 drop in rate. Or you can rent a court when available for $30/hour.
fees: Private — Membership options are available, but not required

name: Ross Christian Church
description: Come play pickleball at Ross Christian Church in Hamilton, OH! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Swanton Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Swanton Memorial Park in United States, OH! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: The Pickle Lodge North Shore
description:
Welcome to The Pickle Lodge — where pickleball passion and top-notch indulgence collide. Here, you won’t just play pickleball; you’ll live it. With 17 dedicated, individually-fenced indoor courts and 6 more outdoors, we’re redefining the game and the entire experience. Designed by players, for players, every detail was built with your perfect day on the court in mind.

But the Lodge is more than courts—it’s community, connection, and celebration. Our conference rooms are the ideal backdrop for private gatherings or corporate parties, offering a unique space where business meets play. And with a full team of pros and instructors on site daily, your game will sharpen while your fun multiplies. (Bonus: memberships aren’t required—you can jump right into the action, no strings attached.)

Worked up an appetite? Drift over to Two Cities Pizza, where salads, sandwiches, pizzas, calzones, and wings keep hunger at bay. Need to quench your thirst? Erne’s Pickle Bar has you covered with 18 rotating beer taps, plus an impressive lineup of cans, seltzers, ciders, wine, and spirits.

So grab your paddle, fuel up, kick back, and soak in the good vibes. At The Pickle Lodge, you’ll find the ultimate pickleball and dining experience—your new favorite hangout both on and off the court.
open_play_schedule: Rated Open Play Sessions Start at 7AM Daily
fees: Fee required — Memberships are not required at The Pickle Lodge, but they are designed to save you money. If you're interested in playing at The Pickle Lodge, download our app and create a non-memnber
